title: pariana interrupta
intro: Pariana interrupta, also known as the interrupted pariana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Pariana interrupta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Pariana interrupta often involve infusions of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
